summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Today Task application completed successfully. All core features working perfectly including task CRUD operations, themes, typography, sorting, localStorage persistence, and upcoming task indicators.
passed_tests: Task creation with title input and Add button
Task creation with date/time reminder functionality
Task editing via modal (open, edit title, save)
Theme switching - all 4 themes (Light, Dark, Corporate Blue, Nature Green)
Typography switching - all 3 fonts (Modern, Classic, Technical)
Task sorting by date vs recent
localStorage persistence for tasks, theme, and font settings
Upcoming task visual indicators (yellow border for tasks due within 24 hours)
Mobile responsiveness with settings panel toggle
Empty state display for new app
